where.if: AND ( lower(a.title) LIKE concat('%', lower(#{q}), '%') OR lower(coalesce(a.addr1, '')) LIKE concat('%', lower(#{q}), '%') OR lower(coalesce(a.addr2, '')) LIKE concat('%', lower(#{q}), '%') )

if.test: bboxMinLng != null and bboxMinLat != null and bboxMaxLng != null and bboxMaxLat != null

where.if: AND a.longitude BETWEEN #{bboxMinLng} AND #{bboxMaxLng} AND a.latitude BETWEEN #{bboxMinLat} AND #{bboxMaxLat}

mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM tourism_source.attractions a LEFT JOIN tourism_source.contenttypes ct ON ct.content_type_id = a.content_type_id

SELECT a.content_id, a.title, NULLIF(concat_ws(' ', a.addr1, a.addr2), '') AS address, a.latitude, a.longitude, coalesce(image.public_url, a.first_image1, a.first_image2) AS thumbnail_url, coalesce(ct.content_type_name, 'UNKNOWN') AS category FROM tourism_source.attractions a LEFT JOIN tourism_source.contenttypes ct ON ct.content_type_id = a.content_type_id LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT ai.public_url FROM tourism_source.attraction_images ai WHERE ai.attraction_no = a.no AND ai.is_active = true ORDER BY ai.display_order ASC, ai.created_at ASC LIMIT 1 ) image ON true
ORDER BY a.source_modified_at DESC NULLS LAST, a.imported_at DESC, a.no DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET (#{page} * #{size})
